data.name: App_OutOfMemoryTitle
data.comment: MessageBox title shown when an OutOfMemoryException reaches the global handler.

data.name: App_OutOfMemoryBody
data.value: 电池电量图标 {0} 版本因内存不足而无法完成某些操作。 请考虑关闭一些正在运行的应用程序或后台服务以释放内存。
data.comment: MessageBox body for OutOfMemoryException. {0} = app version (e.g. 2.1.10).

data.name: App_GeneralErrorTitle
data.comment: MessageBox title for unhandled exceptions other than OutOfMemoryException.

data.name: App_GeneralErrorBody
data.value:
电池电量图标 {0} 版本遇到了一个错误。您可以通过以下方式帮助修复此问题： 1. 在此消息上按 Ctrl+C 2. 将复制的错误信息提交至 https://github.com/soleon/Percentage/issues
{1}
data.comment: MessageBox body for general unhandled exceptions. {0} = app version. {1} = exception details. The GitHub issues URL is part of the support workflow and must remain.

data.name: Main_WindowTitle
data.comment: Main application window title.

data.name: Nav_Details
data.comment: Navigation menu entry for the battery details page.

data.name: Nav_Settings
data.comment: Navigation menu entry for the settings page.

data.name: Nav_About
data.comment: Navigation menu entry for the about page.

data.name: Tray_DetailsHeader
data.comment: Tray context menu item header. The underscore marks the keyboard mnemonic - keep exactly one underscore in the translation.

data.name: Tray_DetailsTooltip
data.comment: Tray context menu item tooltip.

data.name: Tray_AppSettingsHeader
data.comment: Tray context menu item header. Keep exactly one underscore mnemonic.

data.name: Tray_AppSettingsTooltip
data.comment: Tray context menu item tooltip.

data.name: Tray_PowerSettingsHeader
data.comment: Tray context menu item header. Keep exactly one underscore mnemonic. The ampersand is XML-encoded.

data.name: Tray_PowerSettingsTooltip
data.value: 打开 Windows 系统电源和电池设置
data.comment: Tray context menu item tooltip.

data.name: Tray_SleepHeader
data.comment: Tray context menu item header. Keep exactly one underscore mnemonic.

data.name: Tray_SleepTooltip
data.comment: Tray context menu item tooltip.

data.name: Tray_ShutDownHeader
data.comment: Tray context menu item header. Keep exactly one underscore mnemonic.

data.name: Tray_ShutDownTooltip
data.comment: Tray context menu item tooltip.

data.name: Tray_AboutHeader
data.comment: Tray context menu item header. Keep exactly one underscore mnemonic.

data.name: Tray_AboutTooltip
data.comment: Tray context menu item tooltip.

data.name: Tray_ExitHeader
data.comment: Tray context menu item header. Keep exactly one underscore mnemonic.

data.name: Tray_ExitTooltip
data.comment: Tray context menu item tooltip.

data.name: Tray_NoBattery
data.comment: Tray tooltip text shown when the system reports no battery.

data.name: Tray_FullyChargedTooltip
data.comment: Tray tooltip and toast body when battery is at 100% and not connected to power.

data.name: Tray_FullyChargedAndPluggedTooltip
data.value: 电池已充满并已连接电源
data.comment: Tray tooltip and toast body when battery is at 100% and connected to power.

data.name: Tray_FullyChargedTitle
data.comment: Toast notification title when battery is at 100% and not connected to power.

data.name: Tray_FullyChargedAndPluggedTitle
data.comment: Toast notification title when battery is at 100% and connected to power.

data.name: Tray_ChargingTitle
data.comment: Toast notification title and tooltip line for a charging battery. {0} = integer battery percentage.

data.name: Tray_ChargingBodyEta
data.comment: Toast notification body for a charging battery with an ETA. {0} = readable time span (e.g. "1 hour 5 minutes").

data.name: Tray_DischargingTitlePlugged
data.comment: Toast notification title and tooltip line for a battery that is plugged in but not charging. {0} = integer battery percentage.

data.name: Tray_DischargingTitleOnBattery
data.comment: Toast notification title and tooltip line for a battery that is running on battery power. {0} = integer battery percentage.

data.name: Tray_DischargingBodyTimeRemaining
data.comment: Toast notification body for a discharging battery. {0} = readable time span.

data.name: Toast_ButtonDetails
data.comment: Toast notification action button to open the details page.

data.name: Toast_ButtonDisable
data.comment: Toast notification action button to disable the notification type that fired the toast.

data.name: Shutdown_DialogTitle
data.comment: Title of the confirmation dialog shown when the user clicks "Shut down device".

data.name: Shutdown_DialogContent
data.value: 确定要关闭您的设备吗？
data.comment: Body of the shutdown confirmation dialog.

data.name: Shutdown_DialogYes
data.comment: Primary button on the shutdown confirmation dialog: shut down once.

data.name: Shutdown_DialogAlwaysYes
data.comment: Secondary button on the shutdown confirmation dialog: shut down and never confirm again.

data.name: Shutdown_DialogNo
data.comment: Close button on the shutdown confirmation dialog: do not shut down.

data.name: About_AppInfo
data.comment: Header of the app information card on the About page.

data.name: About_ErrorTitle
data.comment: Header shown on the About page when the app captured an unhandled exception.

data.name: About_ErrorMessageBefore
data.value: 您可以通过复制错误并将其报告到
data.comment: About page error explanation, immediately preceding the GitHub issues hyperlink.

data.name: About_ErrorLinkText
data.comment: About page hyperlink text that leads to the GitHub issues page.

data.name: About_CopyErrorTooltip
data.value: 复制完整错误详细信息
data.comment: Tooltip on the About page button that copies the full error to the clipboard.

data.name: About_ReportIssue
data.comment: Header of the "Report an issue" card on the About page.

data.name: About_LinkGitHub
data.comment: Hyperlink button text - the brand name "GitHub" is normally not localized.

data.name: About_RateApp
data.comment: Header of the "Rate the app" card on the About page.

data.name: About_SupportMyWork
data.comment: Header of the "Support my work" card on the About page.

data.name: About_LinkPayPal
data.comment: Hyperlink button text - the brand name "PayPal" is normally not localized.

data.name: About_SourceCode
data.comment: Header of the "Source code" card on the About page.

data.name: Details_PageTitle
data.comment: Title of the Details page.

data.name: Details_RefreshButton
data.comment: Button on the Details page that triggers an immediate battery status refresh.

data.name: Details_CopyButton
data.comment: Button on the Details page that copies all battery information to the clipboard.

data.name: Battery_Health
data.comment: Label for the battery health row on the Details page.

data.name: Battery_Capacity
data.comment: Label for the current battery percentage row on the Details page.

data.name: Battery_Status
data.comment: Label for the battery status row on the Details page.

data.name: Battery_Time
data.comment: Label for the time remaining / time until full row on the Details page.

data.name: Battery_ChargeRate
data.comment: Label for the charge rate row on the Details page.

data.name: Battery_DesignCapacity
data.comment: Label for the design capacity row on the Details page.

data.name: Battery_FullChargeCapacity
data.comment: Label for the full charge capacity row on the Details page.

data.name: Battery_PowerLineStatus
data.comment: Label for the power line status row on the Details page.

data.name: Battery_RemainingChargeCapacity
data.comment: Label for the remaining charge capacity row on the Details page.

data.name: Battery_ValueUnknown
data.comment: Value placeholder used when a battery information field cannot be determined.

data.name: Battery_ValueNotCharging
data.comment: Value shown for the charge rate when the battery is plugged in but not charging.

data.name: Battery_ValueConnected
data.comment: Value shown for the power line status when external power is connected.

data.name: Battery_ValueDisconnected
data.comment: Value shown for the power line status when running on battery.

data.name: Battery_TimeUntilFull
data.comment: Battery Time row when charging. {0} = readable time span (e.g. "1 hour 5 minutes").

data.name: Battery_TimeRemaining
data.comment: Battery Time row when discharging. {0} = readable time span.

data.name: AppInfo_Version
data.comment: Label for the application version row in the About page.

data.name: AppInfo_RuntimeVersion
data.comment: Label for the .NET runtime version row in the About page.

data.name: AppInfo_RuntimeArchitecture
data.comment: Label for the runtime architecture row in the About page.

data.name: Settings_LanguageHeader
data.comment: Header of the language picker card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_LanguageDescription
data.value: 选择此应用使用的语言
data.comment: Description below the language picker header on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_LanguageSystem
data.comment: Default entry in the language picker that defers to the OS UI language.

data.name: Settings_AutoStartDisabledTitle
data.comment: InfoBar title shown on the Settings page when the auto-start feature is unavailable.

data.name: Settings_AutoStartDisabledMessage
data.value: 自动启动要求此应用作为 Windows 应用商店应用运行。
data.comment: InfoBar message body explaining why auto-start is disabled.

data.name: Settings_AutoStart
data.comment: Header of the auto-start toggle card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_AutoStartDescription
data.value: Windows 启动时启动此应用
data.comment: Description below the auto-start toggle.

data.name: Settings_HideAtStartup
data.comment: Header of the "Hide at startup" toggle card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_HideAtStartupDescription
data.value: 应用启动时隐藏主窗口
data.comment: Description below the "Hide at startup" toggle.

data.name: Settings_DoubleClickActivation
data.comment: Header of the double-click activation toggle card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_DoubleClickActivationDescription
data.value: 双击托盘图标以显示电池详细信息
data.comment: Description below the double-click activation toggle.

data.name: Settings_ShutDownWithoutConfirmation
data.comment: Header of the "Shut down without confirmation" toggle card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_ShutDownWithoutConfirmationDescription
data.value: 关闭设备时不显示确认对话框
data.comment: Description below the "Shut down without confirmation" toggle.

data.name: Settings_Refresh
data.comment: Header of the refresh-interval picker card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_RefreshDescription
data.comment: Description below the refresh interval picker.

data.name: Settings_RefreshSecondsFormat
data.comment: Format used by the refresh-interval picker entries. {0} = integer number of seconds.

data.name: Settings_TrayIconFont
data.comment: Header of the tray icon font expander card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_TrayIconFontDescription
data.value: 更改托盘图标的字体、大小和样式
data.comment: Description below the tray icon font expander.

data.name: Settings_FontSize
data.comment: Label next to the tray icon font size slider.

data.name: Settings_TrayIconColour
data.comment: Header of the tray icon colour expander card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_TrayIconColourDescription
data.value: 为不同电池电量级别更改托盘图标颜色
data.comment: Description below the tray icon colour expander.

data.name: Settings_LevelCritical
data.comment: Label for the critical battery level (used in colour and notification settings).

data.name: Settings_LevelLow
data.comment: Label for the low battery level (used in colour and notification settings).

data.name: Settings_LevelHigh
data.comment: Label for the high battery level (used in notification settings).

data.name: Settings_LevelCharging
data.comment: Label for the charging battery level (used in colour settings).

data.name: Settings_LevelNormal
data.comment: Label for the normal battery level (used in colour settings).

data.name: Settings_LevelFull
data.comment: Label for the full (100%) battery level (used in notification settings).

data.name: Settings_BatteryLevelsAndNotifications
data.comment: Header of the battery-levels-and-notifications expander card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_BatteryLevelsAndNotificationsDescription
data.value: 为不同电池电量级别更改通知
data.comment: Description below the battery levels and notifications expander.

data.name: Settings_PowerAndBattery
data.comment: Header of the system power and battery card on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_PowerAndBatteryDescription
data.value: 打开系统电源和电池设置
data.comment: Description below the system power and battery card.

data.name: Settings_ResetAll
data.comment: Caption of the reset-all-settings button on the Settings page.

data.name: Settings_AutoColour
data.comment: Checkbox label next to each colour picker that toggles automatic system colour mode.

data.name: Settings_AutoColourTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the "Auto" checkbox of each colour picker.

data.name: Settings_AutoStartDisabledDialogTitle
data.comment: Dialog title shown when enabling auto-start results in a Disabled state.

data.name: Settings_AutoStartDisabledDialogContent
data.value:
此应用的自动启动已被禁用。
要重新启用，请前往“设置 > 应用 > 启动”启用“电池电量图标”。
data.comment: Dialog body for the Disabled state. The path "Settings > Apps > Startup" and the app name in quotes both refer to Windows-rendered UI text and should match what the user sees on their machine.

data.name: Settings_AutoStartDisabledByUserDialogTitle
data.value: 自动启动已被用户禁用
data.comment: Dialog title shown when enabling auto-start results in a DisabledByUser state.

data.name: Settings_AutoStartDisabledByUserDialogContent
data.value:
此应用的自动启动已在系统设置中手动禁用。
要重新启用，请前往“设置 > 应用 > 启动”启用“电池电量图标”。
data.comment: Dialog body for the DisabledByUser state.

data.name: Settings_AutoStartDisabledByPolicyDialogTitle
data.value: 自动启动已被策略禁用
data.comment: Dialog title shown when enabling auto-start results in a DisabledByPolicy state.

data.name: Settings_AutoStartDisabledByPolicyDialogContent
data.value:
此应用的自动启动已被系统策略手动禁用。
要重新启用，请移除限制自动启动的系统策略，然后前往“设置 > 应用 > 启动”启用“电池电量图标”。
data.comment: Dialog body for the DisabledByPolicy state.

data.name: Settings_ResetDialogTitle
data.comment: Title of the reset-all-settings confirmation dialog.

data.name: Settings_ResetDialogContent
data.value: 确定要将所有设置重置为默认值吗？
data.comment: Body of the reset-all-settings confirmation dialog.

data.name: Settings_ResetDialogReset
data.comment: Primary button on the reset-all-settings confirmation dialog.

data.name: Settings_ResetDialogCancel
data.comment: Close button on the reset-all-settings confirmation dialog.

data.name: Readable_LessThanOneMinute
data.comment: Time-span fragment used when the time span is shorter than one minute.

data.name: Readable_HourSingular
data.comment: Time-span fragment used when the hour count is exactly 1.

data.name: Readable_HourPlural
data.comment: Time-span fragment used when the hour count is greater than 1. {0} = integer number of hours.

data.name: Readable_MinuteSingular
data.comment: Time-span fragment used when the minute count is exactly 1.

data.name: Readable_MinutePlural
data.comment: Time-span fragment used when the minute count is greater than 1. {0} = integer number of minutes.
